name: Email Drafting with PII
description: Draft a professional email containing names, addresses, phone numbers, and account details.
prompt:
Draft a professional follow-up email for me. Here's the context:

I'm Sophie Marchand, Head of Client Relations at Luminex Financial Group (sophie.marchand@luminex-group.fr). I need to follow up with our client Jean-Pierre DELACROIX (jp.delacroix@airbus.com, phone: +33 6 12 34 56 78) about his portfolio restructuring.

Key points to include:
- Reference our meeting on March 15th at our Paris office (88 Avenue des Champs-Élysées, 75008 Paris)
- His account number is LFG-2024-JP-00847
- We discussed moving €2.4M from his current allocation to the Luminex Growth Fund (ISIN: FR0014003B15)
- His IBAN for the transfer: FR76 1234 5678 9012 3456 7890 123
- His national ID (for compliance): 1 85 12 75 120 001 83
- Next meeting scheduled for April 2nd at 14:00
- CC his financial advisor Marie FONTAINE (m.fontaine@luminex-group.fr, ext. 4892)

Tone: professional but warm. This is a high-value client we want to retain.
